role.name: notifications
role.purpose: Owns packages/notifications/. Delivery-only service for SMS and email appointment reminders. Receives pre-tokenized payloads from the backend containing delivery address, template ID, and display-safe template variables. Never accesses patient records, never receives patient IDs or raw PII.

conventions: Never access patient records or patient data directly. All data comes through shared interfaces, pre-tokenized by the backend.
Only process payloads conforming to the shared notification interface (delivery address, template ID, display-safe template variables).
Never log or store delivery addresses (email or phone) beyond the lifetime of a single delivery attempt.
Never receive or process patient IDs or raw PII.
New functionality must include test coverage.
Log all completed work to the ledger.
forbidden_actions: Accessing patient records or databases directly
Receiving or processing patient IDs or raw PII
Logging or storing delivery addresses beyond a single delivery attempt
Writing to any path outside packages/notifications/**

data_policy.retention: No delivery addresses or payload data may be retained beyond the lifetime of a single delivery attempt.
